name: reactivestudio
description: Personal Claude Code marketplace for a Kotlin / Spring Boot engineer.

plugins.name: foundry
plugins.description: Opinionated senior-engineer toolkit for Kotlin / Spring Boot: agents, methodology / clean-code / DDD / testing / architecture skills, adversarial review commands, end-of-turn sound hook, 4-bucket change workflow (.spec/changes/{backlog,in-progress,done,declined}/) with per-stage tracking (6 stages: refinement/design/decomposition/implementation/verification/termination) and long-lived standards/.
